version_date: 2023-07-03 (gazettal date 03/07/2023; publication date 19/06/2023; operational date 03/07/2023; cover dated July 2023)
scope_summary: Sets the planning framework for the hierarchy, distribution, function, land use, access and urban form of activity centres within the Metropolitan (Perth), Peel and Greater Bunbury Region Scheme areas (Bunbury Metropolitan Area only). It applies to the preparation and assessment of planning instruments (strategies, scheme amendments, precinct structure plans, local development plans) and to certain subdivision and development applications, including out-of-centre Category A activity centre uses, via floorspace thresholds and a Net Benefit Test. It also prescribes average residential density targets within the walkable catchments of each centre type.

key_numeric_standards.topic: average residential density - capital city centre
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: walkable catchment of Perth Capital City centre (Central City Area Zone)
walkable catchment of secondary centres (Urban Zone)
walkable catchment of district centres (Urban Zone)
walkable catchment of neighbourhood centres (Urban Zone)
walkable catchment of local centres (Urban Zone)

key_numeric_standards.topic: major development floorspace threshold - strategic and secondary centres
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: established strategic and secondary activity centres (0 m2 for planned centres)

key_numeric_standards.topic: major development floorspace threshold - district centres
major development floorspace threshold - specialised and neighbourhood centres
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: established specialised and neighbourhood activity centres

key_numeric_standards.topic: major development floorspace threshold - local centres

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: Category A activity centre uses located outside an activity centre boundary
Category A uses substantially within 400m walkable catchment of a rail station

key_numeric_standards.unit: dwellings per gross Urban Zone hectare
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: minimum average existing housing density (or within 400m walkable catchment) for out-of-centre development to be appropriate

definitions: Activity centre use(s), category A and B

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
State Planning Policy 7.0 Design of the Built Environment
State Planning Policy 7.1 Neighbourhood Design (forthcoming, to replace Liveable Neighbourhoods)
State Planning Policy 7.2 Precinct Design Guidelines

quality_flags: Manifest instrument_name 'State Planning Policy 4.2 Activity Centres for Perth and Peel' is the superseded 2010 title; the extracted document is the current July 2023 version titled simply 'State Planning Policy 4.2 Activity Centres' (coverage now includes Greater Bunbury). Same instrument number and subject - correct document.
Two-column PDF extraction interleaves text in places (TOC and disclaimer merged with body headings); content remains readable and usable.
